title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 10 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 10 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 10 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 10/02/2022
DCE iron ore futures rose largely today，an increase more than 3% throughout the day.the main contract closed 821.5. some tradersnegotiation pattern is more flexible. some traders were active to sell, steel mills purchased on demand.
